title: Specify.toml framework authoring config
description: Validates the framework repo authoring blueprint at Specify.toml — which specify-cli SOURCE the framework repo builds. Distinct from runtime .specify/project.yaml.

cli.description: Pinned specify-cli SOURCE dependency the framework repo builds with Cargo: a published tag ({ version }), a git ref ({ git, rev|branch|tag }), or a local checkout ({ path }). Never a published binary, channel, or crates.io range.

version.description: Exact specify-cli release; builds git tag vX.Y.Z. A named exact-tag key — not a channel (next/latest) and not a Cargo caret range.

git.description: specify-cli git URL Cargo fetches and builds.
specify-cli git URL Cargo fetches and builds.

branch.description: Mutable branch ref to build (rebuilt each run); the cross-repo co-dev-in-CI form.

git.description: specify-cli git URL Cargo fetches and builds.

path.description: Local specify-cli checkout directory, built in place. Belongs in a gitignored Specify.local.toml overlay, never the committed file.
